entry.title: Entry #584 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: ***TEXT ONLY NOTICE******ALL CASE DOCUMENTS SHALL CONTAIN A PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL PARTIES WHO DO NOT RECEIVE ELECTRONIC SERVICE THROUGH CM/ECF***NOTICE OF FILING OF CTO AND PUBLICATION OF BRIEFING SCHEDULE (CTO-91) re: pldg. ( 583 in MDL No. 3094, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-07170, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-07175) BRIEFING SCHEDULE IS SET AS FOLLOWS: Oppositions due on or before 6/24/2026.Attorneys must be registered to file in the JPML. Please visit our website for Registration Information. Signed by Clerk of the Panel Jessica D. Birnbaum on 6/17/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3094, NJ/2:26-cv-07170, NJ/2:26-cv-07175 (JL) (Entered: 06/17/2026)
